sql_array: CREATE TABLE TestGraphGroup (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), uri VARCHAR(255));
DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_CREATE ((SELECT name FROM TestGraphGroup WHERE id = 1), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TestGraphGroup));
DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_INS ((SELECT name FROM TestGraphGroup WHERE id = 1), 'http://example.org/' + (SELECT 'test' FROM TestGraphGroup WHERE id = 2));
DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_INS ((SELECT name FROM TestGraphGroup WHERE id = 1), NULL + 'http://unexpected.null/');
DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_INS ('TestGroup', (SELECT DISTINCT uri FROM TestGraphGroup WHERE uri IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1) + '1234');
DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_INS ('TestGroup', (SELECT name || '-' || id FROM TestGraphGroup WHERE id = 1) + (SELECT uri FROM TestGraphGroup WHERE id = 2));
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM TestGraphGroup GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TestGraphGroup) / 2;
SELECT SUM(LENGTH(uri)) + MAX(id) FROM TestGraphGroup WHERE uri IS NOT NULL;
